_comment: Subject overrides for AI symbol-tile generation (scripts/generate-symbol-art.js). Maps ambiguous / proper-noun / abstract / short symbol ids to CONCRETE, SDXL-renderable casino-art subjects. Characters & deities are phrased as golden IDOLS / MASKS / EMBLEMS (inanimate artifacts) so they stay premium AND respect the global 'no people' negative. Concrete common nouns (scarab, pyramid, dragon, crown, apple, sword, skull...) are intentionally omitted — they render well from the humanised id alone.

_comment_gamescoped: GAME-SCOPED overrides ('<game-id>/<symbol-id>') take precedence over the bare symbol key for that one tile only (see symbolSubject in generate-symbol-art.js). Added 2026-06-17 to re-roll the 18 QA-masked tiles (commit 4c19161f) with precise, theme-correct, self-negating subjects so they render real art instead of falling back to emoji. The two 'coin'/'gold' ones are deliberately steered AWAY from generic gold coinage (Chinese square-holed coin; treasure heap of ingots, no coin faces) because SDXL stamps a Bitcoin B on any bare gold-coin prompt — a CLAUDE.md zero-crypto violation.

_comment_gamescoped_crypto_batch: 2026-06-17 crypto-elimination batch: every still-masked 'gold'/'golden'/'desert'/'bar'/'spacecraft'/'innovation' tile whose AI art rendered Bitcoin coinage, a stamped B, or garbled text. Each is steered to a NON-COIN form (gold ingot bars / raw nuggets / theme landscape / blank bullion bar) because SDXL stamps a Bitcoin B or garbled text on any gold-coin or stamped-bar prompt even with anti-crypto negatives. Goal: ZERO latent crypto anywhere in the symbol library, not just on shipped reels.
